Defines the stack size configuration for JerryScript on ESP8266.

# Purpose
This code is a simple C header file used for configuration purposes. It defines a preprocessor macro `JERRY_STACK_SIZE` with a value of 2000, which represents the number of stack items, and is multiplied by four to convert to bytes. The header file uses include guards (`__USER_CONFIG_H__`) to prevent multiple inclusions of the same file, which can help avoid redefinition errors during compilation. The file also includes a copyright notice and licensing information under the Apache License, Version 2.0.
